start_date.description: The start date of the statement period. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

end_date.description: The end date of the statement period. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

statement_period.description: The period covered by this statement.

statement_date.description: The date the statement was issued. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

account_type.description: The type of account, e.g., 'Scotiabank Scene+ Visa Card'.

account_number_ending.description: The last four digits of the account number.

customer_name.description: The name of the primary account holder.

payment_due_date.description: The date by which payment is due. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

total_minimum_payment.description: The total minimum payment required, in currency units.

due_this_statement.description: Key payment information for the current statement.

interest_charged.description: Total interest charged during the statement period, in currency units.

account_balance.description: The final account balance as of the statement date, in currency units.

credit_limit.description: The total credit limit for the account, in currency units.

available_credit.description: The amount of credit currently available, in currency units.

account_summary.description: A summary of account activity and balances.

years.description: Number of years for the estimated payoff time.

months.description: Number of months for the estimated payoff time.

estimated_payoff_time.description: Estimate of the time it will take to pay off the account balance with minimum payments.

anyOf.description: Details regarding interest rates and payment estimates.

interest_information.description: Details regarding interest rates and payment estimates.

transaction_date.description: The date the transaction occurred. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

amount.description: The amount of the transaction, in currency units. Positive for credits, negative for debits.

type.description: Indicates if the transaction was a 'credit' (money received) or 'debit' (money spent).

transactions.description: A list of individual transactions posted to the account.

credits_total.description: The total amount of all credit transactions, in currency units.

debits_total.description: The total amount of all debit transactions, in currency units.

transaction_subtotals.description: Subtotals for credits and debits within the transaction list.
